acceptance_criteria.summary: compact-bead-context.py now emits a JSON bead-context envelope with field-level provenance and untrusted markers for rendered bead fields and dependency titles; bin/cdx wraps fetched context in an explicit untrusted-data block before every bead prompt splice.
Malformed payloads and oversized fields/envelopes fail closed with non-zero exit and clear stderr; cdx no longer falls back to raw bd show text when the compact envelope renderer fails.

Injection fixtures in description, notes, acceptance criteria, and dependency title remain JSON string values under untrusted field metadata, and all cdx bead modes delimit the whole context block as untrusted data.

commits.message: test(CL-wzv9): red -- bead context envelope provenance
feat(CL-wzv9): green -- bead context provenance envelope
test(CL-wzv9): red -- reject malformed oversized context
feat(CL-wzv9): green -- reject malformed oversized context
test(CL-wzv9): red -- isolate injected bead fields
feat(CL-wzv9): green -- isolate bead context prompts

tests.result: 3 passed after AC2 green; 7 passed after AC3 test additions

tests.command: uv run pytest tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py tests/test_cdx_bead_workflow.py -k "compact_context or untrusted_data"
uv run pytest tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py tests/test_route_profiles_schema.py tests/test_cdx_bead_workflow.py

downstream_impacts: bin/cdx -b, -bq, and -br now receive the same untrusted-data wrapper around bead context.
If compact-bead-context.py exists and rejects malformed or oversized bd JSON, cdx aborts instead of falling back to raw bd show text.
When the compact script is unavailable, cdx still allows the existing plain bd show fallback, but the fallback text is wrapped by the same untrusted-data delimiter.

evidence_refs.description: tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py::test_render_context_emits_untrusted_provenance_envelope validates JSON envelope shape and field-level source/trust/untrusted markers.
tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py::test_render_context_isolates_injection_fixture_by_field covers description, notes, acceptance_criteria, and dependency title fixtures.
tests/test_cdx_bead_workflow.py::test_cdx_compact_context_failure_aborts_without_raw_fallback validates compact-script failure does not pass raw bd show output.
